proposal.claim: TEE attestation makes per-message VC proof verification redundant
proposal.structural_delta: protocol complexity: remove per-message verification in InstallNewView
proposal.diff:
--- a/view_change.tla
+++ b/view_change.tla
 InstallNewView(new_leader) ==
-  /\ \A msg \in vc_messages[new_leader]: VerifyVCProof(msg)
   /\ Cardinality(vc_messages[new_leader]) * 2 > Cardinality(Replicas)

review.argument: TEE attestation makes message forgery impossible
